# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type Json = null | boolean | number | string | Json[] | { [k: string]: Json };

type UserRecord = {
  userId: string;
  createdAt: number;
  updatedAt: number;
  attrs: Record<string, string>;
};

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200, headers?: HeadersInit) {
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    status,
    headers: {
      "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
      ...headers,
    },
  });
}

function errorResponse(status: number, message: string, details?: unknown) {
  return jsonResponse({ error: message, ...(details ? { details } : {}) }, status);
}

function parseLimit(v: string | null, def = 50, max = 500) {
  const n = v ? Number(v) : def;
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return def;
  return Math.min(Math.floor(n), max);
}

function toStringVal(v: unknown): string {
  if (v === null || v === undefined) return "";
  if (typeof v === "string") return v;
  if (typeof v === "number" || typeof v === "boolean") return String(v);
  return JSON.stringify(v);
}

function normalizeAttrKey(k: string): string {
  return k.trim();
}

function normalizeAttrVal(v: string): string {
  return v.trim();
}

function kvKeyUser(userId: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", userId];
}

function kvKeyUserAttr(userId: string, attrKey: string, attrVal: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", userId, "attr", attrKey, attrVal];
}

function kvKeyUserAttrPrefix(userId: string, attrKey: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", userId, "attr", attrKey];
}

function kvKeyUserAttrValPrefix(userId: string, attrKey: string, attrVal: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", userId, "attr", attrKey, attrVal];
}

function kvKeyUserIndexByAttr(attrKey: string, attrVal: string, userId: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["usersByAttr", attrKey, attrVal, userId];
}

function kvKeyUserIndexByAttrPrefix(attrKey: string, attrVal: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["usersByAttr", attrKey, attrVal];
}

function kvKeyAllUsersPrefix(): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users"];
}

function parseAttrFilters(url: URL): Array<{ key: string; value: string }> {
  const filters: Array<{ key: string; value: string }> = [];

  for (const [k, v] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    if (k.startsWith("attr.")) {
      const key = normalizeAttrKey(k.slice("attr.".length));
      const value = normalizeAttrVal(v);
      if (key) filters.push({ key, value });
    }
  }

  const attrs = url.searchParams.getAll("attr");
  for (const item of attrs) {
    const eq = item.indexOf("=");
    if (eq > 0) {
      const key = normalizeAttrKey(item.slice(0, eq));
      const value = normalizeAttrVal(item.slice(eq + 1));
      if (key) filters.push({ key, value });
    }
  }

  const rawFilter = url.searchParams.getAll("filter");
  for (const f of rawFilter) {
    const eq = f.indexOf("=");
    if (eq > 0) {
      const key = normalizeAttrKey(f.slice(0, eq));
      const value = normalizeAttrVal(f.slice(eq + 1));
      if (key) filters.push({ key, value });
    }
  }

  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const out: Array<{ key: string; value: string }> = [];
  for (const x of filters) {
    const id = `${x.key}\u0000${x.value}`;
    if (!seen.has(id)) {
      seen.add(id);
      out.push(x);
    }
  }
  return out;
}

async function readJson(req: Request): Promise<Json> {
  const ct = req.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
  if (!ct.toLowerCase().includes("application/json")) return null;
  try {
    return await req.json();
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function corsHeaders(req: Request): HeadersInit {
  const origin = req.headers.get("origin") ?? "*";
  const reqHeaders = req.headers.get("access-control-request-headers") ?? "content-type";
  return {
    "access-control-allow-origin": origin,
    "access-control-allow-methods": "GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS",
    "access-control-allow-headers": reqHeaders,
    "access-control-max-age": "86400",
  };
}

async function ensureUser(userId: string): Promise<UserRecord> {
  const userKey = kvKeyUser(userId);
  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey);
  if (existing.value) return existing.value;

  const now = Date.now();
  const rec: UserRecord = { userId, createdAt: now, updatedAt: now, attrs: {} };
  const ok = (await kv.atomic().check(existing).set(userKey, rec).commit()).ok;
  if (!ok) {
    const again = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey);
    if (again.value) return again.value;
  }
  return rec;
}

async function upsertUser(userId: string, attrs: Record<string, string>): Promise<UserRecord> {
  const userKey = kvKeyUser(userId);
  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey);

  const now = Date.now();
  const base: UserRecord = existing.value ?? { userId, createdAt: now, updatedAt: now, attrs: {} };
  const next: UserRecord = {
    ...base,
    updatedAt: now,
    attrs: { ...base.attrs, ...attrs },
  };

  const atomic = kv.atomic();

  atomic.set(userKey, next);

  const oldAttrs = base.attrs ?? {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(oldAttrs)) {
    if (k in attrs && attrs[k] !== v) {
      atomic.delete(kvKeyUserAttr(userId, k, v));
      atomic.delete(kvKeyUserIndexByAttr(k, v, userId));
    }
  }

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(attrs)) {
    atomic.set(kvKeyUserAttr(userId, k, v), true);
    atomic.set(kvKeyUserIndexByAttr(k, v, userId), true);
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  if (!res.ok) {
    const latest = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey);
    if (latest.value) return latest.value;
    throw new Error("KV atomic commit failed");
  }

  return next;
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const userKey = kvKeyUser(userId);
  const user = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey);
  if (!user.value) return false;

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.delete(userKey);

  const attrs = user.value.attrs ?? {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(attrs)) {
    atomic.delete(kvKeyUserAttr(userId, k, v));
    atomic.delete(kvKeyUserIndexByAttr(k, v, userId));
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  return res.ok;
}

async function listUsers(limit: number, cursor?: string | null) {
  const iter = kv.list<UserRecord>({ prefix: kvKeyAllUsersPrefix() }, { limit, cursor: cursor ?? undefined });
  const items: UserRecord[] = [];
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    if (entry.key.length === 2 && entry.key[0] === "users" && typeof entry.key[1] === "string") {
      if (entry.value) items.push(entry.value);
    }
  }
  return { items, cursor: iter.cursor ?? null };
}

async function searchUsersByAttrAnd(
  filters: Array<{ key: string; value: string }>,
  limit: number,
  cursor?: string | null,
) {
  if (filters.length === 0) {
    return await listUsers(limit, cursor);
  }

  const [primary, ...rest] = filters;

  const prefix = kvKeyUserIndexByAttrPrefix(primary.key, primary.value);
  const iter = kv.list<boolean>({ prefix }, { limit: Math.max(limit * 5, 200), cursor: cursor ?? undefined });

  const items: UserRecord[] = [];
  let scanned = 0;

  for await (const entry of iter) {
    scanned++;
    const key = entry.key;
    const userId = typeof key[key.length - 1] === "string" ? (key[key.length - 1] as string) : null;
    if (!userId) continue;

    let ok = true;
    for (const f of rest) {
      const r = await kv.get<boolean>(kvKeyUserAttr(userId, f.key, f.value));
      if (!r.value) {
        ok = false;
        break;
      }
    }
    if (!ok) continue;

    const u = await kv.get<UserRecord>(kvKeyUser(userId));
    if (u.value) items.push(u.value);

    if (items.length >= limit) break;
    if (scanned > 5000 && items.length === 0) break;
  }

  return { items, cursor: iter.cursor ?? null };
}

function route(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname.replace(/\/+$/g, "") || "/";
  const parts = path.split("/").filter(Boolean);
  return { url, path, parts };
}

serve(async (req) => {
  const ch = corsHeaders(req);
  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: ch });

  try {
    const { url, parts } = route(req);

    if (parts.length === 1 && parts[0] === "health") {
      return jsonResponse({ ok: true }, 200, ch);
    }

    if (parts.length >= 1 && parts[0] === "users") {
      if (req.method === "GET" && parts.length === 1) {
        const limit = parseLimit(url.searchParams.get("limit"), 50, 500);
        const cursor = url.searchParams.get("cursor");
        const filters = parseAttrFilters(url);

        const res = await searchUsersByAttrAnd(filters, limit, cursor);
        return jsonResponse({ ...res, filters }, 200, ch);
      }

      if (req.method === "POST" && parts.length === 1) {
        const body = await readJson(req);
        if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
          return errorResponse(400, "Expected JSON object body", undefined);
        }
        const b = body as Record<string, unknown>;
        const userId = typeof b.userId === "string" && b.userId.trim() ? b.userId.trim() : null;
        if (!userId) return errorResponse(400, "Missing userId");

        const attrsIn = (b.attrs && typeof b.attrs === "object" && !Array.isArray(b.attrs))
          ? (b.attrs as Record<string, unknown>)
          : {};

        const attrs: Record<string, string> = {};
        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(attrsIn)) {
          const nk = normalizeAttrKey(k);
          if (!nk) continue;
          attrs[nk] = normalizeAttrVal(toStringVal(v));
        }

        const rec = await upsertUser(userId, attrs);
        return jsonResponse({ ok: true, user: rec }, 200, ch);
      }

      if (parts.length === 2 && typeof parts[1] === "string") {
        const userId = parts[1];

        if (req.method === "GET") {
          const u = await kv.get<UserRecord>(kvKeyUser(userId));
          if (!u.value) return errorResponse(404, "User not found");
          return jsonResponse({ user: u.value }, 200, ch);
        }

        if (req.method === "DELETE") {
          const ok = await deleteUser(userId);
          if (!ok) return errorResponse(404, "User not found");
          return jsonResponse({ ok: true }, 200, ch);
        }

        if (req.method === "PATCH" || req.method === "PUT") {
          const body = await readJson(req);
          if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
            return errorResponse(400, "Expected JSON object body");
          }
          const b = body as Record<string, unknown>;

          const attrsIn = (b.attrs && typeof b.attrs === "object" && !Array.isArray(b.attrs))
            ? (b.attrs as Record<string, unknown>)
            : (b as Record<string, unknown>);

          const attrs: Record<string, string> = {};
          for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(attrsIn)) {
            if (k === "userId" || k === "createdAt" || k === "updatedAt" || k === "attrs") continue;
            const nk = normalizeAttrKey(k);
            if (!nk) continue;
            attrs[nk] = normalizeAttrVal(toStringVal(v));
          }

          await ensureUser(userId);
          const rec = await upsertUser(userId, attrs);
          return jsonResponse({ ok: true, user: rec }, 200, ch);
        }
      }
    }

    return errorResponse(404, "Not found", { path: new URL(req.url).pathname });
  } catch (err) {
    return jsonResponse(
      { error: "Internal error", message: err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err) },
      500,
      corsHeaders(req),
    );
  }
});
